content:
<form action="/login" method="post">
  <label for="email">Email</label>
  <input id="email" type="email" name="email" autocomplete="email" required>
  <label for="pwd">Password</label>
  <input id="pwd" type="password" name="password" autocomplete="current-password"
         onpaste="return false;" oncopy="return false;" required>
  <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
</form>
note: strength / TP: detector correctly flags. The 'disable paste on password to force re-typing' pattern shipped by countless legacy banking and enterprise login forms;

content:
<form id="signin" onpaste="return false;" oncopy="return false;" autocomplete="off">
  <label for="user">Email</label>
  <input id="user" name="email" type="email">
  <label for="pw">Password</label>
  <input id="pw" name="password" type="password">
  <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
</form>

content:
<form id="loginForm" action="/auth/login" method="post">
  <input type="email" name="email" autocomplete="username" required>
  <input type="password" name="password" autocomplete="current-password" required>
  <input type="hidden" name="recaptcha_token" id="recaptcha_token">
  <button type="submit">Log in</button>
</form>
<script src="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js?render=6Lc_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ"></script>
<script>
  grecaptcha.ready(function () {
    grecaptcha.execute('6Lc_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ', { action: 'login' })
      .then(function (token) { document.getElementById('recaptcha_token').value = token; });
  });
</script>
note: precision / TN: correct silence. Standard Google reCAPTCHA v3 site integration as documented by Google (render= query param + grecaptcha.execute)

content:
<%= form_with url: registrations_path, method: :post do |f| %> <%= f.email_field :email, autocomplete: "username" %> <%= f.password_field :password, autocomplete: "new-password" %>
<%= f.submit "Create account" %> <% end %>
note: precision / TN: correct silence. Cloudflare Turnstile invisible-mode widget embedded in a Rails `form_with` registration form
